_comment: LumaScout — Android App Links digital-asset verification. Replace ANDROID_SHA256_CERT_FINGERPRINT_HERE with the SHA-256 fingerprint of your production signing certificate (from Play Console > Release > App integrity, or `keytool -list -v -keystore <your.jks>`). Must be hosted at https://lumascout.app/.well-known/assetlinks.json, Content-Type: application/json, HTTPS only, no redirects. android:autoVerify=true in AndroidManifest (set by Expo intentFilters autoVerify:true) triggers the Play installer to fetch this on install. Use `adb shell pm get-app-links com.lumascout.app` to verify after a signed build.
